title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Akzo Nobel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Akzo Nobel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Akzo Nobel India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Akzo Nobel India:
Akzo Nobel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
